response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit that is found through devotion and the grace of the guru - the path of bhakti is not possible without the guidance of the guru - the soul must merge with itself and become pure - the true word of the lord is the path to salvation - gene and language are part of the divine message - the visit to the guru is essential for spiritual growth - the language of the soul is the sacred word - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the lord - the visit to the guru is the key to spiritual awakening - the language of the heart is the path to truth - the spirit is purified through devotion and the grace of the lord - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey of the soul - the language of the guru is the key to enlightenment - the spirit is transformed through the grace of the lord - the visit to the guru is the way to salvation - the language of the sacred is the path to the divine - the spirit is united with the lord through devotion and the grace of the guru - the visit to the guru is the way to true understanding - the language of the heart is the way to the divine -
